title: cienfuegosia drummondii
intro: Cienfuegosia drummondii, also known as Desert Marigold or Drummond's Cienfuegosia, is a flowering plant species in the mallow family, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cienfuegosia drummondii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
